name: Camel Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Camel Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and recycling of lead acid batteries in Asia. The company produces AGM, traction, and winding batteries series products. Its products are used in automobiles, agricultural vehicles, ships, forklifts, golf carts, electric vehicles, electric motorcycles, electric bicycles, industrial, and various special purposes vehicles. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Xiangyang, China.
